landing.badge: Sehahi sa ho qetela sa potefolio bakeng sa bahlahisi
landing.subtitle: Ntho e ngoe le e ngoe eo u e hlokang ho bonts'a tsebo ea hau, merero le boiphihlelo.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Re fana ka lisebelisoa tsohle tseo u li hlokang ho hlahella har'a bongata le ho fumana mosebetsi oa litoro tsa hau.
landing.feature1Desc: Hlophisa likarolo tsa hau, merero le litsebo tsa hau habonolo ka mohlophisi oa rona o hlakileng oa pono.
landing.feature2Desc: Khetha ho tsoa ho litempele tse entsoeng ka bokhabane kapa u iketsetse chebahalo ea hau e ikhethang.
landing.feature3Desc: Latela baeti ba hau, bona hore na ke merero efe e hapang tlhokomelo haholo, le tse ling.

deleteAccount.title: Hlakola Account ka ho sa Feleng
deleteAccount.successMessage: Lengolo-tsoibila le netefatsang ho hlakolwa ha ak'haonte le rometswe.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: E hlolehile ho romela lengolo-tsoibila la netefatso.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Na ehlile u batla ho hlakola ak'haonte ea hau ruri?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: O tla fumana lengolo-tsoibila ho netefatsa ho hlakolwa ha akhaonto.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Haeba ho netefalitsoe, lintlha tsohle (portfolio, merero, lipalo-palo) li tla hlakoloa ka ho sa feleng 'me li ke ke tsa fumanoa.

toasts.toastSetup2FAFailed: E hlolehile ho seta 2FA. Ka kopo, leka hape.
toasts.toast2FAEnabled: Netefatso ea lintlha tse peli e lumelletsoe.
toasts.toast2FADisabled: Netefatso ea lintlha tse peli e koetsoe.
toasts.toastSessionEnabled: Tlhokomelo e sebetsang ea nako e lumelletsoe.
toasts.toastSessionDisabled: Tlhokomelo ea nako e ntseng e sebetsa e emisitsoe.
toasts.toastSetupKeyCopied: Konopo ea ho seta e kopitsoe ho clipboard.

privacy.title: leano la lekunutu
privacy.intro: Leano lena la Lekunutu le hlalosa kamoo DevFolio e bokellang, e sebelisang le ho sireletsa litaba tsa hau ha u sebelisa litšebeletso tsa rona.
privacy.section1Content: Re bokella lintlha tseo u fanang ka tsona ka kotloloho ha re theha ak'haonte, ha re etsa li-portfolio, 'me re ikopanya le tšehetso ea rona.
privacy.section2Content: Lintlha tsa hau li sebelisetsoa ho sebetsa, ho hlokomela, le ho fana ka likarolo tsa litšebeletso tsa rona, hammoho le ho buisana le uena mabapi le akhaonto kapa litšebeletso tsa hau.
privacy.section3Content: Re kenya tšebetsong mehato e utloahalang ea ts'ireletso ho sireletsa tlhahisoleseling ea hau hore e se kenelle, e senolehe, kapa e senyehe ntle le tumello.

confirmDeleteAccount.missingToken: Letshwao la netefatso ha le fumanehe.
confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: E hlolehile ho hlakola ak'haonte. E ka 'na eaba letšoao le felile.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Ka kopo ema, re ntse re sebetsa kopo ea hau.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: Lintlha tsohle tsa hau li hlakotsoe ruri. O tla fetisetsoa...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: Ho rometsoe khoutu ea OTP ho lengolo-tsoibila la hau.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: Lengolo-tsoibila lena le ngolisoa ke batho ba bang.
forgotPassword.genericError: Ho na le phoso. Ka kopo, leka hape.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: Nomoro ea OTP e netefalitsoe ka katleho.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Nomoro ea OTP e feletsoe ke nako. Ka kopo, kopa khoutu e ncha.
forgotPassword.otpResent: Ho rometsoe khoutu e ncha ea OTP ho lengolo-tsoibila la hau.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: E hlolehile ho romela khoutu ea OTP hape. Ka kopo, leka hape.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: E atlehile ho lokisa password. Ka kopo, kena ka password ea hau e ncha.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: E hlolehile ho seta phasewete bocha.
forgotPassword.title: U lebetse Password
forgotPassword.description: Kenya aterese ea lengolo-tsoibila e ngolisitsoeng akhaonteng ea hau. Re tla romella khoutu ea OTP ho seta phasewete bocha.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Kenya khoutu ea linomoro tse 6 e rometsoeng lengolo-tsoibila la hau ho netefatsa boitsebiso ba hau.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Theha phasewete e ncha, e matla ho boloka akhaonto ea hau.

verifyEmail.resendError: E hlolehile ho romela lengolo-tsoibila la netefatso. Ka kopo, leka hape.
verifyEmail.title: Sheba lengolo-tsoibila la hau
verifyEmail.description: Re rometse lengolo-tsoibila la netefatso atereseng ea hau ea lengolo-tsoibila. Ka kopo bula lengolo-tsoibila ebe o tobetsa konopo ea <1>"Tiisa Account"</1> ho kenya akhaonto ea hau.
verifyEmail.step1: Bula sesebelisoa sa hau sa lengolo-tsoibila (Gmail, Yahoo, joalo-joalo)
verifyEmail.step2: Batla lengolo-tsoibila le tsoang ho DevFolio le sehlooho se reng "Account Activation"
verifyEmail.step3: Tobetsa konopo ea "Confirm Account" ho lengolo-tsoibila
verifyEmail.step4: U tla fetisetsoa leqepheng la ho kena ho kena
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: Lengolo-tsoibila la netefatso le rometsoe hape!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Ha ua fumana lengolo-tsoibila? Sheba sephutheli sa <1>Spam</1> kapa <2>Junk</2> ho lengolo-tsoibila la hau. Sehokelo sa netefatso se sebetsa bakeng sa <3>lihora tse 24</3>.
